name: Market Fiyatları MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing Turkish grocery market price data (market fiyatları = market prices in Turkish). Enables AI agents to query current product prices from major Turkish supermarket chains — comparing prices across stores for grocery shopping automation and price monitoring in Turkey.
use_cases: Comparing grocery prices across Turkish supermarket chains from shopping assistant agents
Monitoring price changes for specific products in Turkish markets
Building Turkish grocery shopping optimization workflows with AI agents
Price tracking and alert automation for Turkish market products
not_for: Non-Turkish markets or international grocery price data
Financial market prices (this is grocery/supermarket focus)
High-frequency price monitoring (Turkish grocery APIs may have rate limits)
best_when: A Turkish user or developer wants AI shopping assistants to compare grocery prices across Turkish supermarket chains and automate budget-conscious shopping decisions.
avoid_when: You need non-Turkish market data or financial market prices. Also: Turkish-language specific — UI/output in Turkish.

auth.notes: No authentication — scrapes or accesses Turkish grocery price APIs. May require API key for some sources.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — accesses public Turkish market price data
pricing.notes: Free open source. Data from Turkish supermarket APIs or public sources.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on upstream Turkish market APIs

known_agent_gotchas: Turkish-language data — agents must handle Turkish text and product names
Price data may be scraped — subject to upstream site changes breaking the server
Niche tool targeting Turkish market specifically — limited international applicability
Product availability and prices change frequently — data freshness may vary
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public grocery price data — minimal security concerns. Turkish data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public price data — no sensitive information. Turkish market data residency.
